caption: A woman with dark hair tied in a bun and wearing headphones is seated in a studio, speaking into a professional black microphone. She is wearing a dark green t-shirt with a red and white logo and a watch on her left wrist. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring a logo and the white text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST," alongside an image of a man. To her left, a smaller poster displays a close-up of hands. Throughout the sequence, the woman maintains an expressive facial expression, moving her hand toward her chin and mouth. Her hand movements transition from a slight gesture near her chest to touching her lips and chin as she speaks. The setting remains static, with the lighting and background consistent across the scenes, focusing entirely on the woman's talking head and gestures.
